name: claude-ops-bin
description: Runtime dependencies for claude-ops bin scripts (ops-telegram-autolink.mjs, ops-slack-autolink.mjs). Installed separately from telegram-server/ so the .mjs scripts resolve modules from claude-ops/node_modules regardless of invocation cwd.

scripts.test: bash tests/test-no-secrets.sh && for f in bin/ops-*; do head -1 "$f" | grep -qE '^#!(/bin/(ba)?sh|/usr/bin/env (ba)?sh|/usr/bin/env bash)$' && bash -n "$f" || true; done && node --check bin/*.mjs lib/*.mjs
scripts.test:strict: bash tests/test-no-secrets.sh && for f in bin/ops-*; do head -1 "$f" | grep -qE '^#!(/bin/(ba)?sh|/usr/bin/env (ba)?sh|/usr/bin/env bash)$' && bash -n "$f" || { echo "skip non-shell: $f"; }; done && node --check bin/*.mjs lib/*.mjs
